name: Scored-Position SLOT + Per-Sample Delta + Logit Bias + GPTQ-TrainCalib + QK-Gain
blurb: Built on PR #1019. Novel scored-position SLOT: per-sample [bsz,1,512] hidden delta + [bsz,1,vocab] logit bias optimized only on eval-scored positions (last stride=64 per window) with cosine LR 0.008->0.0008 over 16 AdamW steps. Training-data GPTQ calibration (256 batches real data), block_size 64, QK-Gain 4.0, sigmoid-gated skips, Brotli-11 compression. 3-seed mean 0.9300 BPP (std 0.0006), beats merged SOTA 1.1194 by 0.189.
author: resouer
